Object Text: Detect implausible or missing speed information.
Enter safe state after critical faults.
Detect speed values outside valid range.
Disagreement above 150 rpm shall cause DEGRADED.
Speed outside 0–8000 rpm shall cause DEGRADED.
Speed signal older than 250 ms shall time out.
Three actuator mismatches shall cause latched SAFE.
Heartbeat older than 500 ms shall cause latched SAFE.
